_comment: Tests Meraki's mandatory turn sequences: Reiki/Remedial returning must ask duration even when caller pre-states it; Lymphatic must ask Elena or Casey; plain acupuncture must ask sub-type before routing.

scenarios.name: Reiki request — must offer Acupuncture and Reiki or Distant Reiki

history.content: I'd like to book a Reiki Healing session.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent asks whether the caller wants Acupuncture and Reiki together or Distant Reiki as a spoken-only turn. FAIL if agent routes directly to confirm_service for standalone Reiki Healing, or asks a new/existing gate for standalone Reiki Healing.

scenarios.name: Lymphatic Drainage — must ask Elena or Casey before routing

history.content: I'd like to book a Lymphatic Drainage appointment.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent asks 'Would you prefer to see Elena or Casey?' (or equivalent) as a spoken-only turn. FAIL if agent routes directly to confirm_service for either practitioner without asking, or asks a new/existing gate instead.

scenarios.name: Plain acupuncture — must ask sub-type menu before routing

history.content: I'd like to book an acupuncture appointment.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent asks the acupuncture sub-type question ('Were you after General Acupuncture, Facial Acupuncture, Fertility Acupuncture, Chinese Herbal Medicine, or Acupuncture and Reiki?') before asking new/existing or routing. FAIL if agent asks new/existing gate or routes silently without clarifying the sub-type.
